author: Stacey Smith
content: not sure what has happened with this app lately, but I'm in agreement with everyone else's recent reviews. The app will no longer print for me. It gives me various error msgs as if it's my printer's fault (it's not). The app wouldn't load for days, so I un/re-installed & tried printing again, but again- it's my printer's fault, the app says. Yet, when hooked to my computer, my printer works fine... hp- your app needs help, asap.
